name: Clojure
description: Clojure and ClojureScript language support powered by clojure-lsp: completion, diagnostics, go-to-definition, find references, rename, formatting, and refactorings.

config.title: Enable clojure-lsp
config.description: Run the clojure-lsp language server for Clojure files.

config.title: clojure-lsp executable path
config.description: Absolute path to the clojure-lsp binary. Leave blank to look it up on your PATH or auto-download it.

config.title: Server trace
config.description: Trace the communication between Nova and the language server (shown in the Extension Console).

config.title: Language server management
config.description: How clojure-lsp is provided. "Bundled" lets this extension launch and auto-install it (works on all supported Nova versions). "Nova-managed" defers to Nova 14's built-in language server management — install clojure-lsp from Settings → Languages — and this extension will not launch its own server. On Nova 13 and earlier, "Nova-managed" falls back to the bundled server.

config.title: Format on save
config.description: Automatically format Clojure files with clojure-lsp (cljfmt) when they are saved.

config.title: cljfmt config path
config.description: Path to a cljfmt configuration file, forwarded to clojure-lsp. Relative to the project root or absolute. Leave blank to use clojure-lsp's own config (.lsp/config.edn).

configWorkspace.title: Enable clojure-lsp
configWorkspace.description: Run the clojure-lsp language server for Clojure files in this workspace.

configWorkspace.title: clojure-lsp executable path
configWorkspace.description: Absolute path to the clojure-lsp binary for this workspace. Overrides the global setting.

configWorkspace.title: Language server management
configWorkspace.description: How clojure-lsp is provided for this workspace. Overrides the global setting.

configWorkspace.title: Format on save
configWorkspace.description: Automatically format Clojure files on save in this workspace.

configWorkspace.title: cljfmt config path
configWorkspace.description: Path to a cljfmt configuration file for this workspace, forwarded to clojure-lsp. Overrides the global setting.
